name: Drone Sensors (IMU, GPS, Mag, Baro)
concepts_learned: External sensor set vs External AHRS modes
IMU noise density vs random walk
Complete vs partial vs large vehicle calibration
EKF time horizon and latency compensation
key_insights: MATLAB insfilterMARG similar to EKF2/EKF3 architecture
22-state vector: quaternion + position + velocity + biases
IMU at high rate (160Hz), GPS at low rate (1Hz)
Sensor drivers use frontend/backend split pattern
I2C/SPI drivers must run in background thread
UART drivers can run in main thread (serial has buffer)
VectorNav can bypass EKF entirely (External AHRS mode)
VN-300/310 dual GNSS for static heading in multicopters
Noise density and random walk use same units (deg/s/√Hz = deg/√s)
Higher sample rate = more white noise per sample
Bias drift decreases with sample rate (√time relationship)
Bias instability is upper bound on bias standard deviation
Multiply spec values by 10x for real-world conditions
Scale factor error causes systematic position/angle error
Vibration rectification (g²-sensitivity) important in high-vibration
Kalibr model: n(t) white noise + b(t) bias random walk
Allan Deviation: white noise at τ=1s, random walk at τ=3s
Hard iron = constant offset, removed with (max+min)/2
Soft iron = distortion, requires transformation matrix or scale factors
Figure-8 calibration same as PX4 quick calibration
Complete calibration = offset + scale factor per axis
Barometers: BMP388 ±0.66m accuracy, MS5611 common
Baro calibrated against GPS altitude at startup
Relative calibration prevents altitude jumps during sensor switch
Baro vulnerable to prop wash and weather changes
EKF uses delayed time horizon for sensor latency compensation
GPS latency 100-300ms, optical flow 20-50ms, baro 10-50ms
Optical flow provides velocity (not position), needs range finder
Flow calibration: OF.flowX vs IMU.GyrX correlation
questions: Como funciona a calibração hard/soft iron do magnetômetro?
Qual é a precisão típica de barômetros em altitude?
Como GPS latency afeta o EKF?
Quais são as características de ruído de IMUs MEMS?
Como comparar IMUs low-cost vs high-end?
Qual é o custo computacional do EKF a 400Hz?
Como o EKF lida com diferentes taxas de sensores?
next_steps: Ler documentação oficial ArduPilot sobre IMU selection
Estudar datasheets de IMUs comuns (MPU-9250, ICM-42688)
